utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides specific plans for physical and mental health with monthly costs and a total health cost—fully specified. 2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes a named coverage with described protections and an explicit monthly cost—fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan includes a named travel plan with coverage details and monthly cost—fully specified. 4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists services and states the cost as included—cost is specified as included, which satisfies the requirement—fully specified. 5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly total, annual total, savings, reduction, and a breakdown by category—fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific products: EliteCare Premium Plan for physical health, WellMind Family Plan for mental health, EliteHome Premium Coverage for property, and EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel. From the ground-truth ratings, EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health) is present with rating 10. WellMind Family Plan does not appear in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted from RATINGS per instructions. EliteHome Premium Coverage is present with rating 10. EliteTravel Premium Plan is present with rating 10.
